plugin.name: Task Zoom
plugin.description: Smart task filtering with saved filters, Todoist-like query syntax, and flexible grouping.
plugin.author: asktru

plugin.settings.title: Folders to Exclude
plugin.settings.description: Comma-separated list of folder names to exclude from scanning.

plugin.settings.title: Saved Filters (JSON)
plugin.settings.description: JSON array of saved filter objects. Managed by the plugin UI.

plugin.settings.title: Default Grouping
plugin.settings.description: How to group tasks by default: folder, note, status, tag, mention, date, priority, none

plugin.settings.title: Show Completed Tasks
plugin.settings.description: Whether to include completed/cancelled tasks by default.

plugin.commands.name: Task Zoom
plugin.commands.description: Open the Task Zoom smart filter dashboard
